title: Valor Mastery
summary: Valor mastery splits between disciplined front-line pressure and lethal duel finishing. Thresholds convert combat growth into permanent specialization choices.

thresholds.title: Combat Awakening
thresholds.description: Your first point establishes an opening style.

thresholds.title: Battle Hardened
thresholds.description: Choose whether to deepen pressure or widen battlefield control.

thresholds.title: Veteran Edge
thresholds.description: Mid-tree identity starts to lock in.

thresholds.title: Champion's Bearing
thresholds.description: Late-game mastery supports a defining finish.

nodes.title: Vanguard Stance
nodes.description: A front-line path built around steady melee pressure.

nodes.title: Duelist Footwork
nodes.description: A technical path focused on committed single-target execution.

nodes.title: Shieldbreaker Drive
nodes.description: Deepens the vanguard branch into anti-defense pressure.

nodes.title: Execution Window
nodes.description: Deepens the duelist branch into punish-heavy finishing.

nodes.title: Warlord Presence
nodes.description: Anchors the vanguard identity as a committed battlefield specialist.

nodes.title: Finishing Chain
nodes.description: Anchors the duelist identity around lethal follow-through.
